page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs, operating at a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core processing is weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 10% to 25% categories. However, multi-core execution scales to average levels, as demonstrated by Geekbench multi-core, Passmark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression benchmarks. Memory bandwidth is average for large block reads and writes, though the overall Passmark memory score is weak.

Given its compute-heavy 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio, the ecs.sn1.3xlarge is positioned as a compute-optimized instance. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for parallelizable workloads that can leverage all 16 dedicated cores without requiring massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage. Tradeoffs include poor single-threaded performance and limited memory per core. It is suitable for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, compiling software, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio, and contains no local storage or GPU accelerators. Operating under a KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals a significant performance tradeoff: single-core processing capabilities are weak, ranking in the bottom 10% to 25%, whereas multi-core performance scales to average levels across Geekbench and Passmark suites. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for parallelized workloads that do not demand high memory density or local storage. It is best suited for multi-threaded software compilation, static web serving, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge is a compute-optimized x86_64 server with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and average multi-core performance, making it suitable for parallelized workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated cores and a 1:2 memory-to-core ratio for parallelized multi-threaded workloads.

32.0 GB of RAM providing a compute-optimized 1:2 resource ratio
